Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: Harrison's life is in danger when a double rescue goes horribly wrong.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A young boy tragically drowns. Lifeguard Corey rescues Iggy who has swallowed a large amount of water.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 01

Video.summary: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 11

Video.summary: Reidy attends a deja vu rescue. A boy is missing. Lifeguards deal with blue bottle invasions and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 07

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The lifeguards put their lives on the line in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 07

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: A diabetic suffers an epileptic fit and Troy catches bag thieves operating on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards perform CPR on a man initially complaining of chest pains who suddenly has a cardiac arrest.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 09

Video.summary: The lifeguards take the beach buggy into the streets, chasing down an aggressive beachgoer wielding a knife.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jethro takes on the toughest rescue of his career so far. Waves swamp the lifeguard 4WD buggy.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 06

Video.summary: A suspected body is sighted in the water. Ryan bogs the buggy. Jethro dislocates his shoulder on the jet ski.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 09

Video.summary: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 03

Video.summary: A man falls off the jetski rescue mat. Crowds swell to 40,010 so Hoppo must decide whether to clear the water.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 01

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 05

Video.summary: Harries plays matchmaker for Singlets. Lifeguards save 7 people caught in two separate rips.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 04

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings massive crowds. Reidy and Azza race to a man who’s dislocated his shoulder in the water.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 04

Video.summary: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 03

Video.summary: The lifeguards deal with drowning boogie boarders. Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 07

Video.summary: New team members are thrown in the deep end. Boo and Lachie embark on a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 03

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: On New Year's Day lifeguards handle drunk beachgoers. Harries faces a career-defining challenge with a baby.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: New trainee Ryan struggles with the megaphone. Jethro hits it off with a pair of drag queens.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 01

Video.summary: Corey rescues swimmers in massive waves. Trainees Ryan and Glick aim to impress in the lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 13

Video.summary: Students capture their own drowning on a GoPro. Maxi pursues a bag thief and Harries plays the bagpipes.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 11

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with drug and alcohol affected masses. Nicola loses her cool with beach goers.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 06

Video.summary: The Hare Krishnas visit Bondi. Maxi plays a Christmas prank. A scuba diver drowns at Ben Buckler.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 03

Video.summary: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 09

Video.summary: Harrison saves a Korean tour group caught in a rip. Reidy attempts to become the greatest Bondi Santa.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 03

Video.summary: A Chinese backpacker is left comatose after-hours. A father loses his son in a massive crowd.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 02

Video.summary: Singlets treats a severely dislocated knee. Conan O’Brien tries his hand at lifeguarding.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bondi faces a bluebottle invasion. Singlets attends his own son's spinal injury. Clint rescues a drowning man.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 05

Video.summary: A backpacker has a violent seizure for over 15 minutes. Sam attempts a daring move during a dangerous rescue.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 09

Video.summary: New lifeguard Will attends to an unconscious teen. Harries helps tame a fleet of giant inflatables.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 04
